title: Instagram
content: rachana.darda_art's profile picture. Never miss a post from rachana.darda\_art. Video by Rachana.Darda_art on May 28, 2024. I visited the Ghirardelli Chocolate Factory in San Francisco and it was an absolute dream come true. As someone with a major sweet tooth and a love for history, this iconic chocolate haven was a must-see for me. Located in Ghirardelli Square, the factory is more than just a place to buy chocolate—it's a destination filled with rich flavors and delightful experiences. But my favorite part of the visit was indulging in an array of decadent desserts at the Ghirardelli Ice Cream and Chocolate Shop. Whether you're a chocolate lover like me or simply looking for a charming place to explore, the Ghirardelli Chocolate Factory in San Francisco is a must-visit destination that offers an unforgettable experience. title: Ghirardelli Square: the top things to see and do! A local's guide.
content: # Ghirardelli Square  Things to do. ### Ghirardelli Chocolate & More! Ghirardelli Square in San Francisco is a very popular attraction located at Fisherman's Wharf: the go-to spot for chocolate lovers and the best place for ice cream sundaes at the waterfront. But the location is authentic and their chocolates are great. The Ghirardelli Chocolate Company began in 1849 when Italian immigrant Domenico Ghirardelli opened a shop in a tent in Stockton, California, selling candy and other goods to the Gold Rush miners; the same year he also opened a second shop in San Francisco. The Ghirardelli Chocolate Company was incorporated in San Francisco in 1852, and is the oldest, continuously-operating chocolate producer in the U.S. Domenico Ghirardelli is buried in the Mountain View Cemetery in Oakland, California. The main attraction in Ghirardelli Square is, of course, enjoying the Ghirardelli Company's chocolates and ice cream sundaes in their ice cream salons (4 of them at the square).
